chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt. Petition No. S-218 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection-A. 2. For hearing of main case. 01.08.2024. Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Abdul Waris Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The statements filed on behalf of SHO, PS, K.N.Shah and S.S.P Dadu, are taken on record, the copies whereof provided to learned Counsel for the petitioner. It is stated by learned Assistant Advocate General, Sindh on behalf of official Respondents that they will provide legal protection to the Petitioners. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner being satisfied with such statement does not press the instant petition. It is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E
